response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks demonstrable production-scale multi-agent AI systems in fintech, regulatory compliance experience, or leadership scaling teams beyond 10 people — key requirements for this CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic frameworks and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Proven track record in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and real-time systems (e.g., DLang microservices)
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication via workshops and public projects
concerns: No evidence of building or operating multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments
Lacks documented experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
No mention of financial infrastructure (credit risk, working capital, compliance) or hybrid outsourced engineering governance
